title: Resilient Memory Service with Fallback Storage
essence: Database memory with retry logic and localStorage fallback for session continuity
steps: Implement retry logic for transient database failures
Add localStorage fallback for critical memory data
Provide user feedback for memory failures
Monitor memory service health and availability
tradeoffs: Potential memory inconsistency between storage layers
rollback: Remove retry logic and fail fast
Skip user notifications for memory failures

evidence.notes: Improves user experience by maintaining conversation context even during database issues
